title: Investigate checkout conversion drop
task: Find why checkout conversion fell after the EU pricing release and recommend a safe fix.

events.title: Frame the investigation
events.prompt: Investigate the conversion drop. Start by validating the metric, then compare recent changes before proposing a fix.
events.input: Alert: EU checkout conversion decreased from 4.8% to 2.1% after the pricing release.
events.output: I will validate the drop by region and device, compare releases, then inspect checkout errors around the release window.

tool_calls.name: metrics.query
tool_calls.summary: Segmented conversion by market and device

events.title: Validate the signal
events.prompt: Verify whether the conversion decline is isolated and identify the first affected cohort.
events.input: Conversion, sessions, and checkout-start metrics for the last 14 days.
events.output: The decline begins at 09:07 UTC and affects EU desktop checkout only. Traffic and checkout starts are stable, so this is a completion failure.

tool_calls.name: release.lookup
tool_calls.summary: Matched first affected minute to release

events.title: Compare the release
events.prompt: Inspect changes in the EU pricing release that could affect checkout completion.
events.output: The release introduced tax-inclusive display prices and a new VAT validation payload for EU orders. The rollout is 100% in EU, 0% elsewhere.

events.title: Inspect checkout failures
events.prompt: Find errors correlated with failed EU desktop checkout attempts after the release.
events.input: Browser error stream, payment API responses, and anonymized checkout records.
events.output: 87% of failed sessions contain VAT_COUNTRY_MISMATCH. The client sends country: UK for all GB addresses, but the payment API now requires GB.

tool_calls.name: api.replay
tool_calls.summary: Reproduced failure using a GB address

events.title: Recommend a safe fix
events.prompt: Provide a safe remediation, mitigation, and verification plan based only on verified evidence.
events.input: Verified GB country-code mismatch; EU rollout is active.
events.output: Immediately disable the VAT payload flag for GB, normalize ISO alpha-2 country codes client-side, add an API contract test, and monitor conversion plus validation errors for 30 minutes.
